message:
fix: four robot mode bugs — partial merge, SIGKILL escalation, convergence, unused import

BUG 1 (Critical): MergeFailure now includes the partially-updated artifact
so successfully-applied deltas are preserved even when some fail. Both
mergeArtifact and mergeArtifactWithTimestamps return the artifact on error.

BUG 2 (Moderate): After SIGTERM timeout, a 10-second SIGKILL escalation
timer prevents the promise from hanging forever if the child ignores SIGTERM.

BUG 3 (Low-Moderate): Convergence check now requires kills > 0 to prevent
premature convergence on pure-EDIT rounds where 0 kills >= 0 adds was true.

BUG 4 (Low): Removed unused getAgentRole import.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
